classification.cautionReason: Valued early Christian text, but not part of the biblical canon for mainstream Christian denominations.

ccel.title: ANF01. The Apostolic Fathers with Justin Martyr and Irenaeus

source.title: ANF01. The Apostolic Fathers with Justin Martyr and Irenaeus
ANF01. The Apostolic Fathers with Justin Martyr and Irenaeus

verses.text: Wherefore, let us yield obedience to His excellent and glorious will; and imploring His mercy and loving-kindness, while we forsake all fruitless labours, and strife, and envy, which leads to death, let us turn and have recourse to His compassions.
Let us stedfastly contemplate those who have perfectly ministered to His excellent glory.
Let us take (for instance) Enoch, who, being found righteous in obedience, was translated, and death was never known to happen to him.
Noah, being found faithful, preached regeneration to the world through his ministry; and the Lord saved by him the animals which, with one accord, entered into the ark.
